# Ken Patrick Garcia — AI Full Stack Engineer

> Ken Patrick Garcia is an award-winning AI Full Stack Engineer from the
> Philippines who designs and ships AI-powered web and mobile products —
> combining LLM/RAG systems, React/Next.js frontends, Flutter mobile apps,
> and Node.js backends into reliable, performant, real-world software.

## Summary

Ken builds end-to-end intelligent products: from prompt-engineered LLM and
RAG pipelines to polished, accessible interfaces and scalable backends. His
work spans production engineering at Romega Solutions and award-winning
academic and hackathon projects. This site showcases selected projects,
professional experience, certifications, the tech stack he works with,
peer testimonials, and contact details.

## Primary URL

- https://kenbuilds.tech/

## Role & Positioning

- Title: AI Full Stack Engineer
- Open to: full-time engineering roles, freelance, and contract work
- Strengths: AI/LLM integration, RAG, frontend performance, cross-platform
  mobile, clean architecture, and shipping production software
- Location: Philippines (remote-ready, global collaboration)

## Key Topics

- AI full-stack engineering (LLM APIs: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini)
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and vector databases
- AI automation workflows (n8n) and intelligent agents
- React, Next.js, and modern frontend performance
- Flutter and cross-platform mobile development
- Node.js, REST/GraphQL APIs, PostgreSQL/MongoDB
- Three.js / WebGL and interactive 3D web experiences
- Award-winning academic and hackathon products

## Selected Projects

- ARS — Auto Repair Response Network Service (Best Paper, 8th Research
  Congress; Flutter + Firebase civic-tech emergency assistance)
- FlowFit — AI-powered kids' fitness companion (Hackathon Champions 2025;
  Flutter + WearOS + local AI inference)
- Pacebeats — Smart music recommender (1st Runner-Up, InfoTech Olympics
  2025; Kotlin + Jetpack Compose + Samsung Health SDK)

## Why Hire Ken

He pairs strong frontend execution and mobile experience with real AI
integration and a track record of delivery across production, academic,
and competition settings. He cares about accessibility, performance, and
clean, maintainable architecture.
